{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Underlord body
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has the grace of an [[Underlord body]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s [[Underlord body]] prevented his knees from buckling.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
